export.qualityGateBlocked: Quality gate blocked export. Fix issues and retry, or enable "Force export".
export.failed: Export failed, please try again later.

qualityGate.blockedHint: Review the quality report below, then enable force export via the export menu in the top right.
qualityGate.title: Quality Gate
qualityGate.noTaskHint: Quality report will appear after splitting is complete and the assemble stage begins.
qualityGate.blockedPanelHint: Compare thresholds, block reasons, and suggestions. Enable force export from the top-right export menu if needed.

splitRules.title: Chapter Split Rules
splitRules.hint: Enable built-in rules, adjust custom regex, preview with selected rule, then save and execute split on confirm.
splitRules.collapsedWithPreview: Built-in enabled {{enabled}}/{{total}} · Custom {{custom}} · Preview ready ({{chapters}} chapters)
splitRules.previewHint: Preview only validates rules and does not write chapters. Only clicking "Confirm split" will save the draft and execute the official split.
splitRules.noCustomRules: No custom rules. Click "Add rule" to start editing.
splitRules.quickAddHint: Fill in name, regex, and priority first, then save.
splitRules.preambleNote: Note: A "Prologue" chapter will be generated if there is content before the first heading.
splitRules.allChaptersShown: Showing all preview chapters ({{count}}). Scroll down to view.
splitRules.noMatchError: The current rule did not match any chapter headings in the content.
splitRules.matchCountTooLow: The current rule only matched {{count}} headings, not enough for stable splitting.

msg.previewGenerated: Preview generated with selected rule. Draft rules will be saved before executing split on confirm.
msg.previewStale: Preview expired. Re-preview with selected rule.
msg.confirmPreviewStale: Preview expired. Re-preview with selected rule before confirming.
msg.customRuleRequired: Custom rule requires a name and regex.
msg.newRuleRequired: New rule requires a name and regex.

coverage.title: Rewrite Coverage & Rollback Warnings
coverage.hint: Shows the actual distribution of rewritten, preserved, failed, and rolled-back segments.
coverage.noData: No rewrite results yet. Complete the rewrite stage first.

nav.title: Chapter Navigation
nav.hint: Search, filter, and use arrow keys to navigate chapters

workbench.selectChapter: Select a chapter on the left to start.
workbench.sceneHitsHint: This stage identifies by whole chapter; `paragraph_range` is for positioning only and does not represent a paragraph-level split.
workbench.noSceneHitEvidence: No hit evidence for this scene.
workbench.noSceneHits: No scene hits recorded for this chapter.
workbench.rewritePreviewHint: Shows the full chapter rewrite result. You can manually fine-tune the content here.
workbench.previewPlaceholder: Rewrite preview will appear here. You can directly fine-tune the chapter content.
workbench.autoSplitStats: Auto-split: {{segments}} segments triggered, {{parts}} sub-segments processed, merged for display.
workbench.noRewritePlan: No rewrite plan generated for this chapter yet. Preview shows original text.
workbench.noRewriteText: No rewrite text returned successfully. Preview falls back to original. Check "Logs" on the right for failure details.
workbench.windowExplainHint: Shows window offsets first; falls back to compatibility mode (segment level) if window fields are missing.
workbench.compatMode: Compatibility mode: no window fields, assembly will fall back to legacy fields (char/paragraph).
workbench.diffHint: Flat highlighted diff showing additions/deletions. Original imported text is not modified.
workbench.canonicalRules: Canonical rules: normalize newlines, strip trailing whitespace, collapse blank lines, preserve blank lines around chapter headings, normalize body indentation.
workbench.sentenceRules: Sentence alignment rules: normalize whitespace first, then split on sentence-ending punctuation for sentence-by-sentence comparison, reducing noise from newlines and paragraph formatting.
workbench.formatOnlyDiff: Format detection: only formatting changes found (text identical after stripping whitespace). Line break delta: {{delta}}.
workbench.contentDiff: Format detection: content changes found. Line break delta: {{delta}}. Recommend viewing in "Sentence" mode.
workbench.noDiff: Diff matches original. If you expect changes, confirm the correct chapter is selected, or click "Restore auto rewrite" to clear local draft overrides.

rightPanel.sceneHitsHint: This stage identifies by whole chapter; `paragraph_range` is for positioning only.
rightPanel.noSceneHitEvidence: No hit evidence for this scene.

operations.rewriteTargetHint: Target added chars per chapter (reused for whole book)
operations.rewriteTargetDesc: This is a chapter-level target, not per-segment. Set once per novel; leave empty to use rule defaults.
operations.providerSelectMultiple: Select the provider for this rewrite
operations.providerNone: No provider configured. Go to "Model Config" to add one.
operations.providerMultiple: Multiple providers configured. Please select one for this rewrite.
operations.providerRequiredWarning: Rewrite and re-run will remain disabled until a provider is selected.
operations.targetCharsInvalid: Enter a non-negative integer or leave empty for rule defaults.
operations.chapterOpsHint: Affects the current chapter only. If the previous stage is complete, you can execute the next stage chapter by chapter. Full stage control is in "Global stage operations" below.
operations.noMarkedSegmentsWarning: No rewritable segments matched in "Analyze & Mark" for this chapter, so the rewrite result will show 0 segments.
operations.noSegmentsNoopHint: No rewritable segments matched for this chapter. Clicking will return a no-op and keep the original text.
operations.targetInvalidDisabled: Invalid rewrite target setting. Current chapter operations are disabled.
operations.providerMissingDisabled: Multiple providers configured. Select a rewrite provider to enable chapter operations.
operations.prevStageRequiredWarning: Complete "{{prev}}" before executing "{{current}}" for this chapter.
operations.globalUpstreamRequired: Complete upstream stage "{{label}}" before running all. You can also advance chapter by chapter above.
operations.globalOpsHint: These actions apply to all chapters in the current stage.
operations.globalTargetInvalid: Invalid rewrite target setting. Global rewrite actions are disabled.
operations.globalProviderMissing: Multiple providers configured. Select a rewrite provider to enable global rewrite actions.
operations.splitStageNote: Chapter split rules are in the center panel. This panel handles stage actions; the center handles rule editing, preview, and split confirmation.
operations.assembleStageNote: In the assemble stage. Run the full assembly above and check the logs for the full output.

chapterAction.notSupported: This stage does not support per-chapter execution.
chapterAction.selectChapterFirst: Select a chapter from the left panel first.
chapterAction.prevStageRequired: Complete the previous stage "{{label}}" for this chapter first.
chapterAction.providerRequired: Multiple providers configured. Select a provider in rewrite target settings first.
chapterAction.targetInvalid: Invalid rewrite target. Enter a non-negative integer or leave empty for defaults.
chapterAction.noSegments: No rewritable segments matched (segments_total=0, {{time}}). Add matching rules in "Analyze & Mark" and re-run.
chapterAction.rerunWithFailures: Chapter re-run complete. {{total}} segments matched, {{failed}} failed ({{time}}).
chapterAction.actionFailed: Chapter action failed. Check the logs and retry.
chapterAction.noSegmentsFallback: No rewritable segments matched. Original text will be used in the assemble stage.
chapterAction.alreadyFallback: This chapter has already been fully reverted to original. No action needed.
chapterAction.fallbackDone: {{count}} segments in this chapter marked as rejected. Original text will be used in assembly.
chapterAction.fallbackFailed: Failed to revert to original. Check the logs and retry.

logsTab.noPendingLogs: No run logs for this stage yet.
logsTab.failedSegmentsTitle: Failed rewrite segments for current chapter (full)
logsTab.noFailedSegments: No failed segments for this chapter.
logsTab.promptLogsHint: Shows current run window by default. Switch to view history. Newest first, expanded by default.
logsTab.noPromptLogs: No prompt logs for this chapter yet.
